checks.title: npx tsc --noEmit 0 errors (각 패키지 + tw-framework-front)
checks.evidence: G-003 diff = package.json peerDependencies/peerDependenciesMeta field additions + .size-limit.json (NEW) + root package.json devDeps additions. None of these are TypeScript source files. peerDependencies/devDependencies are npm metadata — TypeScript compiler does not consume them. G-002 verify-score (D:/project/topvel_project/TOMIS/.claude/tw-grid/artifacts/MOD-GRID-00/monorepo/G-002-verify-score.json line 28-31) confirmed 'npx pnpm@8.15.0 -r --filter ./packages/* exec tsc --noEmit → EXIT=0, 0 lines output' across 13 packages with tsconfig.base.json strict:true + skipLibCheck:false. Since G-003 introduces no .ts/.tsx changes, the G-002 baseline tsc PASS remains valid for G-003 by transitivity. tw-framework-front unchanged (affectedUsageFiles=[]).

checks.title: vite build 또는 tsup build + size-limit
checks.evidence: Two-part verification: (1) tsup build: G-002 verify-score line 33 confirmed 13 packages × 3 dist files = 39 dist outputs (CJS+ESM+DTS). G-003 introduces no source changes → build artifacts unaffected. (2) size-limit config: .size-limit.json (Read 2026-05-13, 12 entries, brotli:true) defines limits matching C-21: grid-core 30KB, grid-renderers 10KB, grid-export/grid-features 20KB, all 7 grid-pro-* 20KB each, grid (meta) 150KB. Root package.json (Read 2026-05-13, lines 9-11) defines 'size' / 'size-limit' / 'size-limit:ci' scripts; devDeps include size-limit ^11.0.0 + @size-limit/preset-small-lib ^11.0.0. Actual `pnpm size-limit` execution is documented-deviation (AC-005 ↔ EC-01 per finding file: D:/project/topvel_project/TOMIS/.claude/tw-grid/findings/auto-fixed/MOD-GRID-00-G-003-size-limit-execution-skipped.md verified to exist via Read 2026-05-13) — dist outputs are placeholder export{} (G-002 sampled grid-core/dist/index.d.ts), making measurement premature. Resolution scheduled for G-005 (grid-core implementation start). All config artifacts in place; deviation properly documented per ADR-003.

checks.title: 번들 크기 변동 (C-21 한도 준수)
checks.evidence: bundleImpact = +0 KB (goals.json line 226 + spec Section 8.5): peerDependencies는 npm metadata로 런타임 번들 비포함; size-limit + @size-limit/preset-small-lib는 devDependency로 dist 비포함; tsup external 배열(G-002)과 peerDependencies 목록 일관성 유지로 중복 번들링 방지. .size-limit.json 한도 설정값 C-21 완전 준수 (Read 2026-05-13): grid-core 30KB / grid-renderers 10KB / grid-export 20KB / grid-features 20KB / grid-pro-* 7개 각 20KB / grid (meta) 150KB — verify-rubric line 152 'gzipped 변동 +N KB가 한도 내' 충족. 0 KB 변동은 어떤 한도이든 자명하게 통과.

checks.title: 새 의존성 ADR (C-20)
checks.evidence: Two new devDependencies introduced (size-limit ^11.0.0, @size-limit/preset-small-lib ^11.0.0). ADR-MOD-GRID-00-007 'size-limit 도구 선택 + 패키지별 한도' present in D:/project/topvel_project/TOMIS/.claude/tw-grid/decisions/MOD-GRID-00-decisions.md (Grep confirmed 2026-05-13, lines 231, 240, 261-275, 279-280): contains 결정 (size-limit + preset-small-lib), 사유 (C-21 의무), 대안 2개 (bundlesize 각하, custom rollup 각하), trade-off, 라이선스 (MIT — C-9 허용), 번들 영향, 결과. Additionally ADR-MOD-GRID-00-004 'peerDependencies 정책' present (line 184) documenting the peerDependencies decision per C-20. Both ADRs satisfy C-9/C-14/C-20 requirements.

checks.title: 라이선스 명시 (C-24)
checks.evidence: All 12 modified package.json files retain license field (Read 2026-05-13): MIT (4) — grid-core, grid-renderers, grid-export, grid-features; 'SEE LICENSE IN EULA' (8) — grid-pro-tracking, grid-pro-range, grid-pro-datamap, grid-pro-merging, grid-pro-header, grid-pro-agg, grid-pro-master, grid (meta). G-003 did not remove any license fields; new dependencies (size-limit, @size-limit/preset-small-lib) both MIT per ADR-MOD-GRID-00-007 (C-9 allowlist). C-24 license disclosure satisfied. grid-license out of scope (D3) and unchanged.
